name: Twende
overview: Twende is a pangolin, which is the slowest-moving animal in the Savannah. His belief that 'life is about the journey, not the destination' is at odds with his job as a boda boda driver in the busy, fictional African city of Milima.

trailers.title: Ready to jump on? | Twende launch trailer | Showmax
